requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline and LSI Conformity Context
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线与LSI合格评定背景
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線與LSI合格評定背景

summary.en: Lesotho Standards Institution (LSI) is the national standards body for Lesotho. A dedicated mandatory Lesotho technical regulation specifically for EV charging equipment could not be confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14, but EV chargers are electrical equipment and project owners, LSI, LEWA, and LEC can require IEC-based evidence. IEC 61851-1:2017 is the international baseline for conductive EV supply equipment, covering control pilot behaviour, protective earthing, isolation monitoring, interlocks, overcurrent and over-temperature protection, and emergency stop provisions where applicable. IEC 61851-23:2023 addresses DC EV charging stations. Outdoor charger packages should also address IEC 60529 ingress protection, IK mechanical protection where needed, and operation under Lesotho's highland climate, including cold winter conditions and summer storms.
summary.zh: 莱索托标准机构（LSI）是莱索托国家标准机构。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认莱索托已发布专门针对电动汽车充电设备的强制技术法规，但充电桩属于电气设备，项目业主、LSI、LEWA和LEC均可能要求IEC体系证据。IEC 61851-1:2017是电动汽车传导供电设备的国际基线，涵盖控制导引、保护接地、绝缘监测、互锁、过流及过温保护，以及适用时的急停措施。IEC 61851-23:2023适用于直流电动汽车充电站。室外充电桩资料包还应覆盖IEC 60529防护等级、必要时的IK机械防护，以及莱索托高原气候运行条件，包括冬季寒冷和夏季风暴。
summary.zht: 賴索托標準機構（LSI）是賴索托國家標準機構。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認賴索托已發布專門針對電動汽車充電設備的強制技術法規，但充電樁屬於電氣設備，項目業主、LSI、LEWA和LEC均可能要求IEC體系證據。IEC 61851-1:2017是電動汽車傳導供電設備的國際基線，涵蓋控制導引、保護接地、絕緣監測、互鎖、過流及過溫保護，以及適用時的急停措施。IEC 61851-23:2023適用於直流電動汽車充電站。室外充電樁資料包還應覆蓋IEC 60529防護等級、必要時的IK機械防護，以及賴索托高原氣候運行條件，包括冬季寒冷和夏季風暴。

LEWA / LEC project requirements for electrical installations

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, which corresponds structurally to IEC 61851-1 but incorporates China-specific connector, signalling, and communication requirements. GB/T 18487.1-2023 test evidence may help engineering review, but it does not substitute for IEC 61851-accredited reports when a Lesotho project, LSI route, LEWA review, or LEC connection condition asks for IEC evidence. GB/T 27930-2023 is a China DC communication protocol and is not an IEC 61851-24 / CCS2 communication substitute.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023，其结构上对应IEC 61851-1，但包含中国特有的接口、信号及通信要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023测试证据可支持工程审查，但当莱索托项目、LSI路径、LEWA审查或LEC并网条件要求IEC证据时，不能替代IEC 61851认可报告。GB/T 27930-2023是中国直流通信协议，不能替代IEC 61851-24 / CCS2通信。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023，其結構上對應IEC 61851-1，但包含中國特有的接口、信號及通訊要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023測試證據可支持工程審查，但當賴索托項目、LSI路徑、LEWA審查或LEC併網條件要求IEC證據時，不能替代IEC 61851認可報告。GB/T 27930-2023是中國直流通訊協議，不能替代IEC 61851-24 / CCS2通訊。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, accredited IEC safety test reports from an ILAC-recognised laboratory, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC stations, IP and IK enclosure certificates, protective-device ratings, installation instructions suitable for Lesotho electrical contractors, and environmental operating evidence for highland outdoor conditions. A standalone GB/T 18487 report should be treated as a design input only unless accompanied by an IEC clause-level gap assessment and accepted by the project authority.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC安全测试报告、直流充电站IEC 61851-23证据、IP和IK机壳认证书、保护器件额定值、适合莱索托电气承包商使用的安装说明，以及高原户外条件下的环境运行证据。单独的GB/T 18487报告只能作为设计输入，除非配套IEC逐条差距评估并被项目主管方接受。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC安全測試報告、直流充電站IEC 61851-23證據、IP和IK機殼認證書、保護器件額定值、適合賴索托電氣承包商使用的安裝說明，以及高原戶外條件下的環境運行證據。單獨的GB/T 18487報告只能作為設計輸入，除非配套IEC逐條差距評估並被項目主管方接受。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional / project mandatory — no dedicated Lesotho EVSE technical regulation confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14, but IEC 61851 evidence can be mandatory through LSI adoption, LEWA review, LEC connection approval, tender, or project-owner specification
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and certification; it is not accepted as direct IEC 61851 evidence without additional accredited testing or a clause-level gap assessment

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design starting point only. Lesotho-facing EVSE documentation should include IEC 61851-1 evidence, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC stations, enclosure protection certificates, and project-specific LSI / LEWA / LEC acceptance checks.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。面向莱索托的EVSE文件应包括IEC 61851-1证据、直流站IEC 61851-23证据、机壳防护认证书，以及项目特定的LSI / LEWA / LEC接受性核查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。面向賴索托的EVSE文件應包括IEC 61851-1證據、直流站IEC 61851-23證據、機殼防護認證書，以及項目特定的LSI / LEWA / LEC接受性核查。
